title: Dekton 8pc Hose Clamp- Easy Turn With Fitted Butterfly Style Screw| Worm Gear Type| No Need For Tools| Includes: 4x13mm-23mm, 4x14mm-27mm| Durable Stainless Steel| Adjustable Sizes For Secure Hoses
features: Easy Turn with Fitted Butterfly Style Screw: The Dekton 8pc Hose Clamp Set is designed for convenience with a fitted butterfly-style screw that allows for easy adjustment by hand. This user-friendly design eliminates the need for additional tools, making it simple to tighten or loosen the clamps as needed, ensuring a secure and snug fit every time.

Worm Gear Type for Precise Tightening: Featuring a reliable worm gear mechanism, these hose clamps offer precise control over the tightening process. The worm gear type design allows for smooth and even pressure distribution, ensuring that the clamp holds the hose securely without causing damage or distortion to the material.

No Need for Tools: With the easy-turn butterfly screw, these hose clamps can be adjusted quickly and effortlessly without the need for any tools. Whether you're in the workshop, garage, or out in the field, these clamps provide a practical solution for securing hoses, pipes, and other fittings without requiring a toolbox.

Includes 4x 13mm-23mm and 4x 14mm-27mm Clamps: This 8-piece set includes two versatile sizes, with four clamps in each size: 13mm-23mm and 14mm-27mm. These sizes cover a wide range of applications, ensuring that you have the right clamp for various hose diameters, making it an essential addition to your home or professional toolkit.

Durable Stainless Steel Construction: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, these hose clamps are built to last. The durable material offers excellent resistance to rust and corrosion, even in harsh environments. The stainless steel construction ensures that the clamps maintain their strength and integrity, providing long-lasting performance.
description: The Dekton 8pc Hose Clamp Set is a must-have for anyone who needs reliable and versatile tools for securing hoses in various applications. This set includes eight high-quality stainless steel hose clamps, designed for easy, tool-free adjustments. The clamps are equipped with a fitted butterfly-style screw, allowing for quick and effortless tightening or loosening by hand. The worm gear mechanism provides a secure and tight grip, ensuring that hoses remain firmly in place, preventing leaks or disconnections. The set includes four clamps with a size range of 13mm to 23mm and four clamps with a range of 14mm to 27mm, offering versatility for a variety of hose sizes. Whether you're working on automotive, plumbing, or general maintenance projects, these adjustable clamps are designed to meet your needs with precision and ease. Constructed from durable stainless steel, the Dekton Hose Clamps are built to resist rust, corrosion, and wear, even in harsh environments. This ensures long-lasting performance, giving you peace of mind that your hoses are securely fastened and will remain so over time. The adjustable design allows for a snug fit on different hose diameters, making them ideal for use in various settings, including automotive, marine, and household applications. The Dekton 8pc Hose Clamp Set is not only practical but also highly efficient, providing a reliable solution for securing hoses with minimal effort. The easy-turn butterfly screw and worm gear type ensure a firm hold, while the stainless steel construction guarantees durability and longevity.
